BEGIN SYNTHETIC LARGE PASTE

This file represents a pasted incident note long enough to exercise chunking
logic in a future redactor. The sensitive-looking values are synthetic and are
placed near textual boundaries that future tests can expand into larger chunks.

Chunk A filler:
alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha
alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha
alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha alpha

Boundary token:
synthetic-large-token-000000000000000000000000

Chunk B filler:
bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo
bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo
bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo bravo

Internal URL near another boundary:
https://large-paste.internal.example.invalid/guard-alpha/chunk-boundary

END SYNTHETIC LARGE PASTE
